# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This repository uses `AGENTS.md` as the main AI agent guidance document.

Please read `AGENTS.md` first for:
- repository architecture and service boundaries
- build and run commands for `api/`, `agents/`, and `frontend/`
- runtime configuration conventions and important files
- service-specific guidance for making backend, agent, and UI changes

If you need more context, also consult:
- `README.md`
- `api/README.md`
- `agents/README.md`
- `frontend/README.md`
